name: Hamburger Spinach Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain the spinach.
2. Mix cream cheese, sour cream, milk, and onion in a separate bowl until softened.
3. Cook noodles in boiling water for 10 minutes. Drain.
4. Brown the beef and drain well. Add tomato sauce, sugar, garlic powder, salt, pepper, and noodles. Heat through.
5. In a 2-quart casserole dish, place half of the meat-noodle mixture (use about 1/2).
6. Top with half of the cream cheese mixture.
7. Cover with spinach and finish with the remaining meat-noodle mixture.
8. Top with the remainder of the cream cheese mixture.
9. Cover completely with shredded cheddar cheese.
10. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes. Remove from oven and return to oven uncovered until the cheese melts completely (about 5-10 minutes). Serves 4.
